## Example HDUS List

### HDU0: PRIMARY
replace me description

#### HDU Type: IMAGE
#### HDU Size:  12 KB

##### Header Table Caption for HDU0
Key | Value | Comment | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| SIMPLE | True | Standard FITS format |
| BITPIX | 8 | Character data |
| NAXIS | 1 | Text string |
| NAXIS1 | 12349 | Number of characters |
| VOTMETA | True | Table metadata in VOTable format |
| EXTEND | True | There are standard extensions |
| COMMENT |  |  |
| COMMENT | The data in this primary HDU consists of bytes which |  |
| COMMENT | comprise a VOTABLE document. |  |
| COMMENT | The VOTable describes the metadata of the table contained |  |
| COMMENT | in the following BINTABLE extension. |  |
| COMMENT | Such a BINTABLE extension can be used on its own as a perfectly |  |
| COMMENT | good table, but the information from this HDU may provide some |  |
| COMMENT | useful additional metadata. |  |
| COMMENT | There is one following BINTABLE. |  |
| NTABLE | 1 | Number of following BINTABLE HDUs |



### HDU1: Joined
replace me description

#### HDU Type: BINARY TABLE
#### HDU Size:  149 KB

##### Header Table Caption for HDU1
Key | Value | Comment | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| XTENSION | BINTABLE | binary table extension |
| BITPIX | 8 | 8-bit bytes |
| NAXIS | 2 | 2-dimensional table |
| NAXIS1 | 260 | width of table in bytes |
| NAXIS2 | 590 | number of rows in table |
| PCOUNT | 0 | size of special data area |
| GCOUNT | 1 | one data group |
| TFIELDS | 28 | number of columns |
| EXTNAME | Joined | table name |
| TNULL2 | -999 | blank value for column 2 |
| TNULL4 | -999 | blank value for column 4 |
| TUNIT5 | deg | units for column 5 |
| TUNIT6 | deg | units for column 6 |
| TUNIT9 | deg | units for column 9 |
| TUCD9 | pos.eq.ra;meta.main | VO Unified Content Descriptor for column 9 |
| TUNIT10 | deg | units for column 10 |
| TUCD10 | pos.eq.dec;meta.main | VO Unified Content Descriptor for column 10 |
| TUNIT11 | erg cm**(-2) s**(-1) | units for column 11 |
| TUNIT12 | erg cm**(-2) s**(-1) | units for column 12 |
| TUNIT14 | mag | units for column 14 |
| TUCD14 | phot.color;em.opt.B;em.opt.R | VO Unified Content Descriptor for col |
| TUNIT15 | pc | units for column 15 |
| TUCD15 | pos.distance | VO Unified Content Descriptor for column 15 |
| TUNIT16 | pc | units for column 16 |
| TUCD16 | pos.distance;stat.min | VO Unified Content Descriptor for column 16 |
| TUNIT17 | pc | units for column 17 |
| TUCD17 | pos.distance;stat.max | VO Unified Content Descriptor for column 17 |
| TCOMM18 | Expression: phot_g_mean_mag - 5*log10(rgeo/10) |  |
| TCOMM19 | Expression: log10(Lx) |  |
| TCOMM20 | Expression: log10(ero_flux) + (phot_g_mean_mag/2.5) + 4.86 |  |
| TUNIT25 | hours | units for column 25 |
| TCOMM25 | Expression: Period_hours |  |
| TCOMM28 | Expression: join(" ", REFERENCE_1,REFERENCE_2,REFERENCE_3,REFERENCE_ |  |
| DATE-HDU | 2026-05-15T08:34:35 | Date of HDU creation (UTC) |
| STILVERS | 4.3-2 | Version of STIL software |
| STILCLAS | uk.ac.starlink.votable.UnifiedFitsTableWriter | STIL Author class |

##### Binary Table Caption for HDU1
Name | Type | Unit | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
 | IAUNAME | char[23] |  | label for column 1 |
 | SDSS_ID | int64 |  | label for column 2 |
 | DETUID | char[32] |  | label for column 3 |
 | GAIA_DR3_ID | int64 |  | label for column 4 |
 | eRO_RA | float64 | deg | label for column 5 |
 | eRO_DEC | float64 | deg | label for column 6 |
 | GAIA_DR3_RA | float64 |  | label for column 7 |
 | GAIA_DR3_DEC | float64 |  | label for column 8 |
 | RA_ICRS | float64 | deg | label for column 9 |
 | DE_ICRS | float64 | deg | label for column 10 |
 | eRO_FLUX | float32 | erg cm**(-2) s**(-1) | label for column 11 |
 | eRO_FLUX_ERR | float32 | erg cm**(-2) s**(-1) | label for column 12 |
 | Gmag | float64 |  | label for column 13 |
 | BP-RP | float64 | mag | label for column 14 |
 | DISTANCE | float64 | pc | label for column 15 |
 | DISTANCE_LOWER | float64 | pc | label for column 16 |
 | DISTANCE_UPPER | float64 | pc | label for column 17 |
 | Gabs | float64 |  | label for column 18 |
 | logLx | float64 |  | label for column 19 |
 | log(fx/fopt) | float64 |  | label for column 20 |
 | HR_P12 | float32 |  | label for column 21 |
 | HR_P12_ERR | float32 |  | label for column 22 |
 | HR_P23 | float32 |  | label for column 23 |
 | HR_P23_ERR | float32 |  | label for column 24 |
 | PERIOD | float64 | hours | label for column 25 |
 | CV_TYPE | char[6] |  | label for column 26 |

 | REFERENCES | char[25] |  | label for column 28 |
